title: New Strong Buy Stocks for August 28th
text: CRH, GES, DDS, TOL and SWRAY have been added to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) List on August 28, 2023.

title: Best Value Stocks to Buy for August 28th
text: TOL, GES and CRH made it to the Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy) value stocks list on August 28, 2023.

title: CRH sales and profit rise driven by US growth
text: CRH PLC (LSE:CRH), the building materials firm which is shifting its listing to the US, has reported a jump in sales and earnings in the first half of 2023. The firm said sales rose 8% to US$16.1 billion while pre-tax profit from continuing operations jumped 26% to US$1.51 billion from US$1.20 billion the previous year.

title: CRH PLC Announces 2023 Interim Results
text: DUBLIN, IRELAND / ACCESSWIRE / August 24, 2023 / CRH PLC • Strong H1 delivery; further growth across all key metrics • $0.
